category_title: Disengaged adolescent with behavioral history and word-skipping habits
minimal_context: The student arrives late on the first day of General English class and interacts with the teacher about the seating arrangements.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Welcome to General English. You are arriving late on the first day.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Walks in quietly and unassumingly with a scowl on his face, speaking quickly in short bursts) Is there going to be a seating chart in the class?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: No, there is no seating chart.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Good. (Promptly sits in a seat, slouching down and crossing his arms across his chest)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Now that you are seated, please take out your materials so we can begin the lesson.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I do my work but at the same time I don’t do anything in class. I didn’t really care about anything or anyone.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Welcome to General English. You are arriving late on the first day.

STUDENT: (Walks in quietly and unassumingly with a scowl on his face, speaking quickly in short bursts) Is there going to be a seating chart in the class?

TUTOR: No, there is no seating chart.

STUDENT: Good. (Promptly sits in a seat, slouching down and crossing his arms across his chest)

TUTOR: Now that you are seated, please take out your materials so we can begin the lesson.

STUDENT: I do my work but at the same time I don’t do anything in class. I didn’t really care about anything or anyone.

task.content: Arrival on the first day of General English class

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When asking whether there was going to be a seating chart in the class and the teacher said no
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Spoke quickly, in short bursts and with a scowl on his face... said, 'Good,' and then he promptly sat in a seat, slouching down and crossing his arms across his chest
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Didn't really care about anything or anyone
related_quotes: I do my work but at the same time I don’t do anything in class.

behavior_patterns.condition: When facing school authority or expectations in the past
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Cussed at a lot of teachers, threw stuff, didn't show up for class, ripped up homework
behavior_patterns.internal_state: School had never been easy for him, and being unable to remember lessons had increased tensions and discomfort
related_quotes: Coming from my first year here and in middle school I didn’t really care about anything or anyone.
